home.title: I develop
home.description: Full Stack Developer passionate about Web and Gaming

about.content: Passionate about development for several years, I enjoy creating modern web and mobile applications. Always curious to learn new technologies, I approach each project with rigor and creativity. I appreciate both back-end and front-end development, which gives me a complete vision of the projects I work on.

web.title: Web Development
web.content: Design and development of modern web applications, from front-end to back-end, using technologies like PHP or Java.

plugin.title: JAVA Plugin Development (WIP)
plugin.content: Development of custom Java plugins for game servers, to enhance the player experience with new features.

contact.content: Feel free to reach out to me through my networks below 💗, by email at pro.peron.nicolas2@gmail.com, or by phone at 06 16 54 04 91
